scripts.build-wasm: yarn test-rust && yarn build-wasm-compile && mocha rust/test.js && yarn build-wasm-encrypt && yarn build-wasm-convert-to-iife && rimraf rust/web/.gitignore rust/bundler/.gitignore
scripts.build-wasm-compile: yarn build-wasm-base -- --target nodejs --out-dir nodejs --features wasm && yarn build-wasm-base -- --target web --out-dir web --features wasm && yarn build-wasm-base -- --target web --out-dir bundler --features wasm
scripts.build-wasm-base: cd rust && cross-env WASM_BINDGEN_WEAKREF=1 wasm-pack build --release
